CRACK IN WINDSHIELD APPEARED WITHOUT KNOWN CAUSE.  IN SEARCHING THE INTERNET FOR SIMILAR INCIDENTS THERE ARE A NUMBER OF NEW SUBARU LEGACY OWNERS WHO HAVE THIS SAME EXPERIENCE.  THE GLASS IS ON BACKORDER SO REPAIRS MAY BE SEVERAL WEEKS OUT.  SOME OF THE OWNERS HAVE REPORTED MORE

I WAS DRIVING TO WORK WHEN THE ENGINE LOW OIL LIGHT CAME ON.  I CHECKED THE OIL IMMEDIATELY AND IT APPEARED TO BE DOWN ABOUT A QUART. I CONTACTED THE DEALERSHIP AND TOOK IT IN THE NEXT DAY.  THEY CONFIRMED THE OIL WAS DOWN ABOUT A QUART AND STARTED AN ENGINE OIL STUDY.  I AM TO T

MY 2015 SUBARU LEGACY HAS A VERY ABRUPT THROTTLE TIP-IN (THE MANNER IN WHICH POWER IS DELIVERED UPON DEPRESSING THE GAS PEDAL). PUSH THE THROTTLE A LITTLE AND NOTHING HAPPENS AND THEN A LITTLE MORE AND IT TAKES OFF LIKE A SHOT! NOT SAFE WHEN PULLING INTO TIGHT PARKING SPACES.   I

ALMOST EVERY TIME I FILL UP WITH GAS, WHEN THE GAS PUMP SHUTS OFF THERE IS A BACK SPLASH OF GAS OUT OF THE TANK. I WOULD SAY ANYWHERE FROM 1 TO 3 OUNCES OF GAS SPLASHES OUT. DEPENDS ON THE PRESSURE IT'S BEING FILLED AT. I TALKED TO MY DEALER ABOUT IT AND WAS TOLD THAT IS COMMON F

narrative.headline: What 2015 Subaru Legacy owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 159 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Electrical System (23% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.
